title: Executive Order 12400—President's Commission on Strategic Forces

flags.justification: A purely advisory commission of up to fifteen expert members.
A specific report deadline (February 18, 1983) is set.
Single coherent purpose: reviewing the strategic modernization program.
A purely advisory body with no compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
Sec. 4(b) sets a clean, self-executing termination: thirty days after its report, unless sooner extended.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
A purely advisory body with independent expert membership.
The order's own text is narrowly bounded to a specific, time-limited review of ICBM basing options; no broad or ongoing authority is claimed.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (positive). Structural weight: 0/12 = 0.0%. The historically significant 'Scowcroft Commission' on MX missile basing, cleanly scoped and time-limited in its own text.
